$comment: Ontop Core ontology schema v0.2 — extended node kinds and edge kinds for PE topology use case

nodeKinds.description: All recognized node kinds. service is the generic fallback. The others map to architectural layers.

edgeKinds.description: depends_on: runtime dependency between nodes. implements: a milestone or task that created or modified a node.

ruleKinds.description: Rule kinds that can be expressed in a rule pack against this ontology.
